offer: For restaurant stock managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate inventory tracking causes spoilage and financial loss. We generate monthly reports instead of manual tracking spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory tracking leads to spoilage and financial loss.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant stock managers
Indie Hackers posts on inventory tracking solutions
DM outreach to restaurant stock managers with demo video
Community forums for restaurant stock management discussions
try_it: Let users try Monthly inventory report generation and Spoilage alerts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of the manual workflow
Collect interviews from target users for feedback
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for quick access
CSV import feature for existing inventory data
Simplify onboarding steps for new users
